AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: Cerebras has released MiniMax-M2-REAP-162B-A10B, a new memory-efficient version of its MiniMax-M2 model specifically designed for long-context coding agents.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Why we no longer use LangChain for building our AI agents
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: This article discusses the reasons behind discontinuing the use of LangChain for AI agent development, exploring alternative frameworks and strategies.

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Harvard Endowment Takes Rare Leap Into Bitcoin With $443M Bet on BlackRock's IBIT
Blockchain VC Funding.summary: Harvard University's endowment has made a significant $443 million investment in BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF (IBIT), marking a rare institutional embrace of digital assets. This move highlights increasing mainstream adoption and capital allocation towards the cryptocurrency market.

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Alibaba to Use JPMorgan’s Blockchain for Tokenized Dollar and Euro Payments: CNBC
Blockchain VC Funding.summary: Alibaba is reportedly integrating JPMorgan's blockchain technology for tokenized dollar and euro payments, signaling a major enterprise adoption for cross-border transactions. This partnership demonstrates the increasing integration of distributed ledger technology into global commerce and finance.

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Koinify: The Future of Crypto Crowd Funding
Blockchain VC Funding.summary: This article explores Koinify's vision for the future of crypto crowdfunding, presenting it as an evolving mechanism for decentralized project financing. It discusses how these innovative funding models are shaping capital formation in the blockchain space.

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Crypto’s new funding mechanisms: down and dirty guide
Blockchain VC Funding.summary: This guide details new crypto funding mechanisms like STOs and IEOs, offering insights into how blockchain projects raise capital beyond traditional venture funding. It serves as a resource for understanding the diverse fundraising landscape in the decentralized sector.

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Nasdaq, Citi Join Novogratz in Funding Blockchain Firm Symbiont
Blockchain VC Funding.summary: Nasdaq and Citi have participated in a funding round for the blockchain firm Symbiont, alongside Mike Novogratz's Galaxy Digital. This investment signifies strong institutional backing for enterprise blockchain solutions and their market integration.

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Homeland Security Funding Blockchain Technology via SBIRs
Blockchain VC Funding.summary: The Department of Homeland Security is allocating funding to blockchain technology through its Small Business Innovation Research (SBIR) programs. This initiative supports the development of advanced blockchain solutions for government applications and national security.

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Funding Blockchain Ecosystems
Blockchain VC Funding.summary: This piece delves into the strategies and challenges associated with effectively funding broader blockchain ecosystems. It examines the various approaches required to foster sustainable growth and innovation within the decentralized landscape.
